DAYNIGHT.SettingTransitionDurationHint: How long (in milliseconds) the CSS crossfade between themes takes. Set to 0 to disable.
DAYNIGHT.SettingApplyToPlayersHint: When enabled (GM only), the theme change is broadcast to all connected players via socket so everyone switches simultaneously.
DAYNIGHT.SettingNotifyChangesHint: Briefly shows a UI notification when the theme switches between day and night.
